title: Witch reduces opponent creature AL to one on summon

card.rawText: When summoned, your opponents' creatures AL is reduced to 1 until this creature leaves the field or this effect is negated.

plan.title: Witch reduces opponent creature AL to one on summon
plan.summary: Summon Witch and verify its source-linked aura sets the opponent primary creature's effective AL to 1.

notes: Witch's rules text applies when Witch is summoned.
Set player_2 primary to an AL6 creature so the source-linked aura has a visible AL reduction.

steps: Read player_2 primary effective AL while Witch remains on the field.

expectedAssertions.label: Witch is summoned as primary creature
Witch stays on field as aura source

manualVerification: Confirm the AL reduction lasts only while Witch remains on the field or until Witch's effect is negated.
riskNotes: This mirrors Curse's AL-set aura, but verifies the source-linked creature ON_SUMMON version.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Validate Witch's source-linked opponent AL reduction.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
